parameters.query:
SELECT
  nf.id as finding_id,
  nf.title,
  nf.severity,
  nf.priority_bucket,
  nf.validated_at,
  nf.remediation_owner,
  a.asset_value,
  e.name as engagement_name,
  c.name as client_name,
  c.contact_email,
  EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - nf.validated_at) as days_open,
  CASE
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'immediate_attention' THEN 7
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'high_priority' THEN 30
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'medium_priority' THEN 90
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'low_priority' THEN 180
    ELSE 999
  END as sla_days,
  CASE
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'immediate_attention' THEN EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - nf.validated_at) - 7
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'high_priority' THEN EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - nf.validated_at) - 30
    WHEN nf.priority_bucket = 'medium_priority' THEN EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - nf.validated_at) - 90
    ELSE -999
  END as days_overdue
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
JOIN engagements e ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
WHERE nf.validation_status = 'validated'
  AND nf.remediation_status NOT IN ('verified_fixed','accepted_risk')
  AND nf.validated_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    (nf.priority_bucket = 'immediate_attention' AND nf.validated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 days') OR
    (nf.priority_bucket = 'high_priority' AND nf.validated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '24 days') OR
    (nf.priority_bucket = 'medium_priority' AND nf.validated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 days')
  )
ORDER BY days_overdue DESC;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.digest, username: 'RECON OS SLA Watchdog', icon_emoji: ':alarm_clock:' }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, payload)
VALUES ('sla_watchdog_run','wf20','{"overdue":{{ $('Build SLA Report').first().json.overdue_count }},"warning":{{ $('Build SLA Report').first().json.warning_count }},"overdue_critical":{{ $('Build SLA Report').first().json.overdue_critical }}}'::jsonb);

meta.description: RECON OS WF-20: SLA Watchdog — daily 08:30 scan for validated findings approaching or breaching SLA windows (7/30/90/180 days by priority). Alerts Slack with overdue and warning digest.
